rationales.hook_strength: 'Your metabolism isn't broken' is a direct myth-bust that earns the scroll, but the sub-text over-explains and softens the punch before they swipe.
rationales.clarity: Each slide is a single named mechanism (NEAT, spiral, muscle, blind spot, fix) — scannable and immediately actionable.
rationales.audience_fit: NEAT crash and untracked bites are exactly the invisible saboteurs a busy 28-year-old blames on 'bad genetics' — this reframes their lived experience precisely.
rationales.novelty: NEAT and muscle-loss are well-trodden in fitness content; the framing is tighter than average but won't feel revelatory to anyone who follows health creators.
rationales.brand_fit: Claims are hedged, voice is plain and direct, CTA ties naturally to the app's core tracking features without hype or AI-cringe.
rationales.predicted_performance: High save potential from the actionable mechanism breakdown; shares limited because the NEAT angle isn't surprising enough to trigger 'send to a friend' urgency.
